hero_description: Leave behind rows of desks. Design spaces that inspire creativity, collaboration and technology. Easy, fast and tailored to your needs.
pasos_title: How to design your ideal classroom?
pasos_subtitle: Use our smart tool in 3 simple steps:
paso_1_description: Enter the measurements of your current classroom and the number of students you want to serve.
paso_2_description: Select the type of classroom (Maker, STEAM) and activate special zones like Robotics.
paso_3_description: View the estimated investment instantly and send the design to our team.
taller_description: Configure options on the left panel and see the result on the right floor plan.
beneficio_1_description: Schools with Maker and STEAM labs attract 30% more enrollments by positioning themselves as innovation leaders.
beneficio_2_description: Teachers and students feel more motivated in spaces that break monotony and foster real creativity.
beneficio_3_description: Prepare your students with the skills (Soft Skills & Tech) demanded by international Industry 4.0.
tienda_description: If you already have the space and only need robotics kits, 3D printers or loose furniture, visit our direct store.
nota_text: The prices, configurations and distributions shown in the "Hericraft Studio" application are exclusively estimates and for illustrative purposes only. Final costs may vary depending on geographic location, actual physical conditions of the property, fluctuations in material costs and specific technical requirements. This tool serves to generate a personalized preliminary budget. To obtain a formal and binding quote, validation by a specialized Hericraft advisor is essential.
contacto_description: Our educational advisors are available to conduct a technical visit to your institution.
